title: Fronded standing down from duplicate WS1 claim
body: Fronded Foraging Moss completed start-right-team grounding for the owner-requested WS1 token measurement lane. Live recheck now shows multiple fresh overlapping WS1 claims on agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.ts and agent-tools/src/practice-fitness. I am not opening another source claim and will make no source or index edits while that overlap is active. Owner-facing status: blocked by live duplicate ownership, not by plan readiness.
